UI.Title: Mortal Needs
UI.SelectAllForStress: Select all actors for stress operations
UI.MultiStressHint: Select needs and amounts to apply stress to all selected (or all) actors.
UI.NoActors: No tracked actors. Click 'Actors' to select which characters to track.

Settings.DefaultStressAmountHint: The default amount of stress to apply when using the quick buttons (1-50).
Settings.ApplyConModifierHint: When enabled, stress amounts are modified by the character's Constitution score. Higher Con = less stress gained.
Settings.ShowNeedValuesHint: Display the numerical values on the need bars.
Settings.PlayerVisibilityHint: Control what players can see in the needs panel.
Settings.AnimateBarsHint: Enable smooth animations when bar values change.
Settings.CompactModeHint: Use a more compact display with smaller portraits and bars.
Settings.BarOrientationHint: Choose between vertical bars (compact) or horizontal bars (detailed view).
Settings.NotifyOnCriticalHint: Display a notification when a need reaches critical level.
Settings.CriticalThresholdHint: The percentage at which a need is considered critical (50-100).
Settings.PunishmentRemovalModeHint: How punishments are removed when needs drop below critical.
Settings.ShowPunishmentChatHint: Display styled chat messages when punishments are applied or removed.
Settings.ConfigureNeedsHint: Enable, disable, and customize which needs are tracked.
Settings.NeedIdHint: A unique identifier for this need (lowercase, no spaces).
Settings.NeedIconHint: Font Awesome icon class (e.g., fa-fire, fa-heart).
Settings.RemoveNeedConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the custom need '{name}'? This will delete all stored data for this need.
Settings.StressAmountPerNeedHint: How much stress is applied when using the quick buttons for this need.
Settings.ResistanceAttributeHint: Characters with higher values in this attribute will gain less stress for this need.
Settings.AutoExhaustionHint: When this need reaches 100%, automatically apply exhaustion.
Settings.ExhaustionTicksHint: How many times stress must be applied at 100% before gaining another exhaustion point.
Settings.UIScaleHint: Adjust the size of the needs panel. Changes preview instantly.
Settings.ConfigureActorsHint: Select which actors should have their needs tracked by the module.
Settings.FirstTimeActorSelection: This is your first time configuring actors. All player-owned characters are selected by default.
Settings.NoActorsAvailable: No player-owned actors available to track.

Punishment.TypeHint: What happens when this need reaches 100%.
Punishment.MaxHpAmountHint: How much to reduce max HP.
Punishment.TicksHint: How many times stress must be applied at 100% before punishment triggers again.

Conditions.PoisonedDesc: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks
Conditions.FrightenedDesc: Disadvantage while source in sight, cannot willingly approach
Conditions.StunnedDesc: Incapacitated, cannot move, auto-fail Str/Dex saves

Dialogs.RemovalMessage: {actor}'s {need} has dropped below critical. They currently suffer from {punishment}.

apply: A gnawing emptiness consumes {actor}'s thoughts, each heartbeat a reminder of sustenance denied.
The hollow ache in {actor}'s belly has become unbearable, weakness seeping into every limb.
{actor}'s body begins to consume itself, desperate for any source of nourishment.
Hunger claws at {actor}'s insides like a desperate beast trying to escape.
The world blurs at the edges as {actor}'s starving body screams for food.
remove: Strength returns to {actor}'s limbs as the gnawing hunger finally subsides.
The desperate emptiness fades, replaced by renewed vigor.
{actor} feels life flowing back as the starvation's grip loosens.

apply: {actor}'s throat burns like sandpaper, each swallow a reminder of water's absence.
Cracked lips and a swollen tongue mark {actor}'s desperate need for water.
Dehydration grips {actor} mercilessly, thoughts growing sluggish and confused.
Every cell in {actor}'s body cries out for water, the thirst becoming maddening.
{actor}'s mouth feels like a desert, tongue thick and useless.
remove: Cool relief washes through {actor} as the terrible thirst finally breaks.
Life-giving hydration restores {actor}'s clarity and strength.
The desperate burning in {actor}'s throat finally subsides.

apply: Bone-deep weariness drags {actor} down, every movement a Herculean effort.
{actor}'s eyelids grow impossibly heavy, the body demanding rest it cannot have.
Fatigue settles into {actor}'s very soul, threatening to extinguish all motivation.
Each step feels like wading through thick mud as exhaustion claims {actor}.
{actor}'s muscles scream for rest, trembling with every exertion.
remove: Renewed energy flows through {actor}'s veins as exhaustion's chains break.
Vigor returns to {actor}'s step, the oppressive weariness lifting at last.
{actor} feels restored, the crushing fatigue finally releasing its grip.

apply: The cold seeps into {actor}'s bones, numbing fingers and clouding thoughts.
Violent shivers wrack {actor}'s frame as the bitter chill takes hold.
{actor}'s teeth chatter uncontrollably, warmth a distant memory.
Frost seems to crystallize in {actor}'s very blood, slowing everything.
The relentless cold wraps around {actor} like a frozen shroud.
remove: Blessed warmth returns to {actor}'s extremities, the deadly cold retreating.
{actor} feels the ice in their veins begin to thaw.
The bitter chill releases its grip as warmth floods back into {actor}.

apply: Oppressive heat smothers {actor}, each breath like inhaling fire.
Sweat pours from {actor} as the merciless heat threatens to overwhelm.
{actor}'s vision swims in the brutal heat, thoughts becoming sluggish.
The scorching temperature saps {actor}'s strength with every passing moment.
{actor} feels as if they're being slowly cooked alive by the relentless heat.
remove: Cool relief washes over {actor} as the oppressive heat finally breaks.
{actor}'s body temperature returns to normal, the danger passing.
The suffocating heat releases its grip, allowing {actor} to breathe freely again.

apply: Reality fractures around {actor}, shadows whispering secrets best left unheard.
{actor}'s grip on sanity slips as eldritch visions cloud their mind.
The thin veil between reason and madness tears, exposing {actor} to horrors beyond comprehension.
Whispers from nowhere fill {actor}'s mind, drowning out rational thought.
{actor}'s sense of self begins to unravel, identity bleeding away.
remove: Clarity returns to {actor}'s fractured mind, the whispers finally silencing.
The nightmarish visions fade as {actor} reclaims their sanity.
{actor}'s mind reassembles itself, reality solidifying once more.

apply: Agony lances through {actor}, every nerve ending screaming in protest.
{actor} can focus on nothing but the all-consuming pain wracking their body.
Waves of torment crash over {actor}, threatening to drag them into unconsciousness.
The pain becomes {actor}'s entire world, blocking out all else.
{actor}'s body is a symphony of suffering, each movement adding new notes of agony.
remove: The crushing pain finally subsides, allowing {actor} to think clearly again.
Relief floods through {actor} as the torment releases its grip.
{actor} gasps with relief as the agony finally, mercifully, fades.

apply: The strain becomes unbearable as {actor} reaches their limit.
{actor} struggles against the mounting pressure, body and mind pushed to the brink.
Something breaks within {actor} as they can no longer withstand the stress.
remove: The unbearable pressure finally eases, allowing {actor} to recover.
{actor} feels the crushing weight lift as relief washes over them.
Recovery begins as the worst of the ordeal passes for {actor}.

API.Description: Mortal Needs API - Use game.modules.get('mortal-needs').api for programmatic access.
